candidates.name: Cloud teleportation pattern (& prefix)
candidates.description: Send long-running tasks to Claude Code Web with & prefix, pull results locally with --teleport. Could solve terminal-blocking agent problem.

candidates.name: Plugin marketplace ecosystem status
candidates.description: Anthropic marketplace (36 curated plugins, Dec 2025). Community marketplaces emerging. We haven't adopted — worth tracking maturity.

candidates.name: Junior engineer framing validation
candidates.description: External validation that treating Claude Code as a junior engineer (not autopilot) produces best results. Aligns with our guardrails approach.

candidates.name: Tutorial structure as onboarding template
candidates.description: Setup→Daily Use→Advanced→Production progression. 20 sections with clear hierarchy. Could template a SoNash onboarding guide.

candidates.name: Feature-breadth coverage as completeness benchmark
candidates.description: Checklist of Claude Code features an external expert considers important. Use to verify our CLAUDE.md and skill coverage.

candidates.name: Features without enforcement anti-pattern
candidates.description: Describing hooks as automation without gates. CLAUDE.md as memory without rules. Misses the reliability layer entirely.

candidates.name: No compaction discussion anti-pattern
candidates.description: Treating context as unlimited. No state loss discussion, no checkpoint strategies. Major operational gap for power users.
